name: Build Padavan NEWIFI3

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
    paths:
      - 'NEWIFI3.config'

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          path: rt-n56u-src

      - name: Move repository to /opt/rt-n56u
        run: |
          sudo mkdir -p /opt/rt-n56u
          sudo chown -R runner:runner /opt/rt-n56u
          mv rt-n56u-src/* /opt/rt-n56u/ || true
          mv rt-n56u-src/.* /opt/rt-n56u/ 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Initialize Environment
        env:
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND: noninteractive
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y unzip libtool-bin curl cmake gperf gawk flex bison nano xxd fakeroot \
            cpio git python3-docutils gettext automake autopoint texinfo build-essential help2man \
            pkg-config zlib1g-dev libgmp3-dev libmpc-dev libmpfr-dev libncurses5-dev libltdl-dev wget libc-dev-bin
          sudo update-alternatives --set fakeroot /usr/bin/fakeroot-sysv || true

      - name: Setup Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.21'
          cache: false

      - name: Download AdGuardHome binary
        run: |
          AGH_URL=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome/releases/latest \
            | grep "browser_download_url" \
            | grep "mipsle_softfloat.tar.gz" \
            | cut -d '"' -f 4)
          echo "Downloading AGH from: $AGH_URL"
          curl -L -o /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/user/adguardhome/AdGuardHome_linux_mipsle_softfloat.tar.gz "$AGH_URL"
          echo "Downloaded: $(du -h /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/user/adguardhome/AdGuardHome_linux_mipsle_softfloat.tar.gz | cut -f1)"

      - name: Download Tailscale binary
        run: |
          # lmq8267/tailscale: binary đơn lẻ (combined tailscale+tailscaled)
          # Release URL: https://github.com/lmq8267/tailscale/releases/latest
          TS_URL=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/lmq8267/tailscale/releases/latest \
            | grep "browser_download_url" \
            | grep "tailscaled_full" \
            | head -1 \
            | cut -d '"' -f 4)
          echo "Downloading Tailscale from: $TS_URL"
          if [ -z "$TS_URL" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Could not find tailscaled_full URL"
            curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/lmq8267/tailscale/releases/latest | grep "browser_download_url"
            exit 1
          fi
          mkdir -p /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/user/tailscale
          curl -L -o /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/user/tailscale/tailscaled_full "$TS_URL"
          chmod +x /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/user/tailscale/tailscaled_full
          file /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/user/tailscale/tailscaled_full
          echo "Downloaded: $(du -h /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/user/tailscale/tailscaled_full | cut -f1)"

      - name: Download CA Certificates for AGH
        run: |
          curl -L -o /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/user/adguardhome/ca-certificates.crt \
            https://curl.se/ca/cacert.pem
          echo "CA certs: $(du -h /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/user/adguardhome/ca-certificates.crt | cut -f1)"

      - name: Prepare Config
        run: |
          cp -f /opt/rt-n56u/NEWIFI3.config /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/configs/templates/NEWIFI3.config || true
          cp -f /opt/rt-n56u/NEWIFI3.config /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/configs/templates/NEWIFI-D2.config || true
          cp -f /opt/rt-n56u/NEWIFI3.config /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/configs/templates/newifi3.config || true
          cp -f /opt/rt-n56u/NEWIFI3.config /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/.config
          cp -f /opt/rt-n56u/kernel-3.4.x.config /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/linux-3.4.x/.config
          cd /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/linux-3.4.x
          make ARCH=mips olddefconfig || (yes "" | make ARCH=mips oldconfig)
          cp -f /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/linux-3.4.x/.config /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/configs/boards/NEWIFI3/kernel-3.4.x.config

      - name: Cache Toolchain
        id: cache-toolchain
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: /opt/rt-n56u/toolchain-mipsel/toolchain-3.4.x
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-padavan-toolchain-3.4.x-v1

      - name: Build Toolchain from Source
        if: steps.cache-toolchain.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          cd /opt/rt-n56u/toolchain-mipsel
          if [ -f "./build_toolchain" ]; then
            ./build_toolchain
          elif [ -f "./build_toolchain_3.4.x" ]; then
            ./build_toolchain_3.4.x
          else
            echo "No build_toolchain found!"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Build Firmware
        run: |
          cd /opt/rt-n56u/trunk
          ./clear_tree
          if [ -f "./build_firmware_modify" ]; then
            fakeroot ./build_firmware_modify NEWIFI3
          elif [ -f "./build_firmware" ]; then
            fakeroot ./build_firmware
          else
            echo "No build script found!"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Prepare Release Artifacts
        id: prepare_files
        run: |
          echo "release_tag=NEWIFI3-$(date +'%Y.%m.%d-%H%M')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "compile_date=$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Upload Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: Padavan-NEWIFI3-Firmware
          path: |
            /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/images/*.trx
            /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/images/*.md5

      - name: Create Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.ref == 'refs/heads/master'
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ steps.prepare_files.outputs.release_tag }}
          name: NEWIFI3 Padavan Firmware [${{ steps.prepare_files.outputs.compile_date }}]
          body: |
            ### Padavan Firmware for Newifi 3 (D2)
            - **Build time:** `${{ steps.prepare_files.outputs.compile_date }}`
            - **Features:** AdGuardHome + Tailscale VPN + SQM HTB+fq_codel + SMB + FTP + USB
            - **AGH binary:** mipsle_softfloat, loaded to RAM on boot
            - **Config:** NEWIFI3.config from repo

            *Built automatically with GitHub Actions (Toolchain Cached).*
          files: |
            /opt/rt-n56u/trunk/images/*.trx
